global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with gameplay elements and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to join the game with no ads for the first week.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: VoxelRealm logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'VoxelRealm' in bold, modern typography, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Geometric shapes in a light green color, creating a playful and dynamic background pattern.

elements.label: Gameplay screenshot
elements.description: A visual representation of the gameplay interface, showing interactive elements and a grid layout.

elements.label: Join the arena text
elements.description: Bold, large text stating 'Join the arena' in a dark font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A small icon representing gameplay elements, located at the top left corner.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: Small geometric shapes in a light color, adding visual interest at the top right.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A small circular icon representing gameplay, positioned near the top center.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon representing gameplay, located in the center area.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A small circular icon representing gameplay, positioned near the top left.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A small circular icon representing gameplay, located in the center area.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'VoxelRealm' in large, bold text at the top of the ad.

elements.label: No ads message
elements.description: Text stating 'No ads in first week' in a clear, readable font, centered below the headline.
elements.text_content: Join the arena No ads in first week

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Start now' in a bold font, located at the bottom of the ad.
